title: Trace Dots Practice
subtitle: Trace letters, numbers, and short words.
instructions: Follow the dot guides to form each letter, number, or word.

items.prompt: Trace the letter A by following the dots.
Trace the letter B by following the dots.
Trace the letter C by following the dots.
Trace the letter M by following the dots.
Trace the letter S by following the dots.
Trace the number 1 by following the dots.
Trace the number 2 by following the dots.
Trace the number 3 by following the dots.
Trace the number 5 by following the dots.
Trace the number 8 by following the dots.
Trace the word CAT by following the dots.
Trace the word DOG by following the dots.
Trace the word SUN by following the dots.
Trace the word MOON by following the dots.
Trace the word STAR by following the dots.
Trace the word APPLE by following the dots.
Trace the word TREE by following the dots.
Trace the word BALL by following the dots.
